overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval village at night. The scene begins in a rainy village with stone cottages, transitions across a wooden bridge where precipitation changes to snow, passes through a fortified stone gate, and ends in a wilderness area with armored guards.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow village street with stone cottages

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the village street between stone buildings

entered.detail: rough stone wall of a village cottage with warm torchlight
tall stone wall forming the right boundary of the narrow street
dark wooden doorway set into the stone building
burning torch mounted on the wall casting orange light

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a narrow village street at night, flanked by stone cottages with thatched roofs. Warm torchlight illuminates the wet stone walls as rain falls, creating a moody atmosphere in the enclosed alleyway.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden bridge crossing with stone gatehouse ahead

events.description: steps onto wooden bridge leaving the narrow village street
precipitation changes from rain to snow

agents.ego_description: crossing the wooden bridge while approaching the village gate

notable_agents.action: guard in red armor standing stationary on the bridge holding a polearm

entered.detail: wooden plank bridge with railings crossing over water
fortified stone gate structure marking the village exit
dark water visible below the bridge planks

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a wooden bridge over water, leaving the village proper. A guard in red armor stands watch on the right side. Around the 25-second mark, the rain transitions to falling snow as the stone gatehouse looms ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested path approaching stone arch gate

events.description: entering the stone gate tunnel from the forested approach

agents.ego_description: walking through the forested approach and entering the stone gate passage

entered.detail: dense evergreen trees lining the dirt path
large stone archway with wooden roof structure marking the village boundary

segments.scene_description: Snow falls steadily as Geralt walks along a forested path toward a large stone arch gate. The environment shifts from open bridge to enclosed tree-lined trail, then into the dark stone tunnel of the gate itself.

scene_state.functional_zone: wilderness path beyond the village walls

events.description: exiting the stone gate into the open wilderness

agents.ego_description: walking past armored guards and continuing into the wilderness beyond the village

notable_agents.action: armored guard with horned helmet and torch standing by the gate exit
second armored guard with torch patrolling near the wall

entered.detail: dense dark forest surrounding the wilderness path
Nilfgaardian soldiers in ornate armor with horns and red accents

segments.scene_description: Exiting the stone gate into the open wilderness, Geralt passes two armored guards bearing torches. Snow continues to fall as the path leads deeper into the dark forest, leaving the village behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rainy, torch-lit medieval village into a snowy, dark wilderness. It begins in a narrow alleyway flanked by thatched-roof stone cottages, where warm light reflects off wet walls under a steady rainfall. As the camera follows Geralt across a wooden bridge guarded by a soldier in red armor, the rain gradually transitions into falling snow while a stone gatehouse looms in the distance. The scene then shifts from the open bridge to a tree-lined forest path, leading the camera through the dark, enclosed tunnel of a massive stone arch. Finally, the view opens up into the wilderness as the camera passes torch-bearing armored guards and moves deeper into the snowy forest.
